capabilities.name: Categories/tags
capabilities.notes: Tags are admin-UI only (no tag skill); categories have both surfaces.

capabilities.name: Scheduled publishing
capabilities.verify: publish_scheduled_content skill (rpc:publish_scheduled_pages); SchedulePublishDialog.tsx + Scheduled badge in BlogPostsTab.tsx

capabilities.name: SEO meta
capabilities.verify: BlogPostEditorPage SEO panel exposes seoTitle, description, ogImage, canonicalUrl, keywords. BlogPostPage.tsx feeds them into SeoHead which renders <title>, <meta description/keywords>, og:image, og:url + <link rel=canonical>.

capabilities.name: Comments
capabilities.verify: blog_comments table (RLS: public reads approved only, anon can INSERT pending, admins moderate). Public form in BlogComments.tsx (honeypot spam guard). Admin queue in BlogCommentsTab.tsx via moderate_blog_comment RPC. Skills: moderate_blog_comment, list_blog_comments.

capabilities.name: RSS feed
capabilities.verify: blog-rss edge function emits valid RSS 2.0 (channel + item with title/link/guid/pubDate/description/author/categories/enclosure). Skill get_blog_rss_url resolves the feed URL. RSS toggle + link in BlogSettingsTab.tsx and BlogArchivePage.

capabilities.name: Author pages
capabilities.verify: Public route /blog/author/:slug -> BlogAuthorPage.tsx. Resolves slug against profiles (uuid direct or slugified full_name via blog_author_slug SQL helper). Lists all published posts by that author. BlogPostPage links to it from the AuthorCard.

capabilities.name: AI-written posts via operator
capabilities.verify: write_blog_post skill in blog-module skillSeeds (plus research_content, generate_content_proposal)

capabilities.name: Social post generation from content
capabilities.verify: generate_social_post + social_post_batch skills in blog-module skillSeeds
